title: ProDec 4 inch Block Brush for Rapid Painting with Emulsion, Masonry Paint, Woodstains Timber Treatment, Varnish on Indoor and Outdoor Walls, Ceilings, Sheds, Fences, Ideal for Rough Surfaces, 4" 100mm
features: 4" (100mm) x 30mm high capacity block brush for rapid coverage of large areas
Durable, high quality 100% synthetic filaments for applying emulsion (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), masonry paint, wood treatments and wallpaper paste
Trade quality shaped wooden handle for comfort
Built-in pot hook for easy storage
Hanging hole for easy storage and drying
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint High capacity means high efficiency Block brushes have a much higher paint holding capacity than flat paint brushes and are an effective way to power through large areas rapidly. Ideal for applying emulsion paints to surfaces such as walls and ceilings, masonry paints to textured surfaces, wood treatments to surfaces such as fences and sheds, as well as wallpaper paste, this brush features durable, high quality 100% synthetic filaments that load well and release smoothly throughout the stroke for efficient coverage. Because the bristle is synthetic, it's easy to clean and the brush maintains its shape after washing, ready for the next use. As block brushes are often gripped with a closed fist, unlike flat brushes, the wooden handle is rounded to fit comfortably in your hand and enable you to easily reverse it to maximise the amount of paint, stain or paste you put down with each loading. The handle has a hanging hole for storage, which is also a great way to dry the brush after washing and let gravity do the work, helping it maintain its shape ready for next use. There's also a handy pot clip to rest the brush on the side of the can when it's not in use, or to allow excess paint to drain away. Exterior painting & woodstaining brushes from ProDec Whether you're painting or staining on masonry or wood, ProDec has a range of trade quality brushes to help you get a great finish. Flat masonry brushes Made with a blend of hardwearing pure grey bristle and synthetic filaments combining performance and durability, ProDec's flat masonry brush is tailored to rough surfaces to deliver paint right into even heavy textures for fast, efficient coverage. Available in 4" (100mm) and 5" (125mm) widths. Block brush High capacity 4" (100mm) x 30mm block brush for rapid coverage of large masonry or timber areas. Made with durable, high quality 100% synthetic filaments that load well and release smoothly throughout the stroke for efficient coverage. Shed & Fence brush 4” (100mm) size for fast, efficient application of most wood and timber treatments, stains and preservatives on fences, sheds, summer houses, gates, benches and more. Mixture of pure and synthetic bristles for the optimum balance of durability and paint/stain pick-up. Decking brush Made from high quality synthetic filaments with longer bristles, designed to target deep decking grooves. Applies woodstains and decking oils smoothly and evenly, giving exceptional coverage of large surface areas, with a screw fit connector for use with extension poles.
